title: Digital Service Design Standard
description: New Zealand government standard providing 12 core principles for designing and delivering user-focused, high-quality digital services. Covers user needs, security, privacy, inclusivity, interdisciplinary collaboration, and accountability to ensure ethical and equitable public service delivery.
